content.rendered:
<select onchange="changepage()" id="selectpage">
<option>Select Course</option>
<option value="1st">B.tech 1st year</option>
<option value="aiml2">B.tech CSE AIML-2nd year</option>
<option value="cs2">B.tech CSE CS-2nd year</option>
<option value="robo2">B.tech Robotics & Automation-2nd year</option>
<option value="aiml3">B.tech CSE AIML-3rd year</option>
<option value="cs3">B.tech CSE CS-3rd year</option>
<option value="robo3">B.tech Robotics & Automation-3rd year</option>
<option value="aiml4">B.tech CSE AIML-4th year</option>
<option value="cs4">B.tech CSE CS-4th year</option>
<option value="robo4">B.tech Robotics & Automation-4th year</option>
</select>
<script>
function changepage() {
window.location = "https://sietpanchkula.ac.in/syllabus/" + selectpage.value;
}
</script>
